### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/libhvee (github.com/containers/libhvee)</summary>

### [`v0.11.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/libhvee/releases/tag/v0.11.0): Release 0.11.0

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/libhvee/compare/v0.10.0...v0.11.0)

+## 0.11.0
+\* DVD Drive Support([`422aa7d`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/libhvee/commit/422aa7d)): Added ability to attach DVD devices when creating VMs, useful for delivering cloud-init configuration via ISO
+\* Improved Error Messages([`567e418`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/libhvee/commit/567e418)): Enhanced Hyper-V job errors to display detailed error descriptions instead of just error codes
+\* Go Dependency updates

</details>
